hey @alice - the token refresh issue in auth middleware is fixed, can you review when you get a chance?
researching: should JWT be stored in httpOnly cookie? StackOverflow says yes for XSS prevention. Also reading about refresh token rotation strategies.

From: alice@company.com
Re: auth middleware review
Looks good! One suggestion: consider using RS256 instead of HS256 for better key rotation. Reply sent.

curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login \

  -d '{"email":"test@company.com","password":"test123"}'

window_title: Chrome - Gmail - Re: Postgres connection pooling
chars:
The issue is likely connection pool exhaustion. Try:
1. pg_pool II for connection pooling
2. Or set pool.max=20 in Prisma
3. Also check long-running transactions holding connections
window_id: Chrome - Gmail - Re: Postgres connection pooling

window_title: Chrome - Gmail - Re: Postgres connection pooling
chars: Thanks, increasing pool size helped. Now seeing occasional timeouts under load though. Attaching slow query log. Can we sync tomorrow?
window_id: Chrome - Gmail - Re: Postgres connection pooling

window_title: Chrome - Stack Overflow - floating point discount
chars:
Floating point precision issue when calculating discounts in JavaScript:
0.1 + 0.2 !== 0.3
Should use: (price * 100 * qty - discount * 100) / 100
Or use a decimal library like decimal.js
window_id: Chrome - Stack Overflow - floating point discount
